'''bagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dreamwise|dreamwise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dreamwise|dreamwise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bagate|bagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bagatesher|bagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bagatesherĂ«m|bagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bagatero|bagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bagateshĂ«|bagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bagateshĂ«m|bagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibagatero|gokibagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibagateshĂ«|gokibagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibagateshĂ«m|gokibagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobagankerom|gobagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobagankeshĂ«|gobagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobagankeshĂ«m|gobagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobagankeya|gobagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bagaterom|bagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bagatemu|bagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bagateya|bagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibagaterom|gokibagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibagatemu|gokibagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibagateya|gokibagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bagagate|bagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bagagatesher|bagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bagagatesherĂ«m|bagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bagagatero|bagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bagagateshĂ«|bagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bagagateshĂ«m|bagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibagagatero|gokibagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibagagateshĂ«|gokibagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibagagateshĂ«m|gokibagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobagagankerom|gobagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobagagankeshĂ«|gobagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobagagankeshĂ«m|gobagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobagagankeya|gobagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bagagaterom|bagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bagagatemu|bagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bagagateya|bagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibagagaterom|gokibagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibagagatemu|gokibagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibagagateya|gokibagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠte|bĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠtesher|bĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠtero|bĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠgĂŠtero|gokibĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠterom|bĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠtemu|bĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠgĂŠteya|bĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠgĂŠterom|gokibĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠgĂŠteya|gokibĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafgafte|bafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafgaftesher|bafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafgaftesherĂ«m|bafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafgaftero|bafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafgafteshĂ«|bafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafgafteshĂ«m|bafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafgaftero|gokibafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafgafteshĂ«|gokibafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafgafteshĂ«m|gokibafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafgafnkerom|gobafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafgafnkeshĂ«|gobafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafgafnkeshĂ«m|gobafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafgafnkeya|gobafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafgafterom|bafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafgaftemu|bafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafgafteya|bafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafgafterom|gokibafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafgaftemu|gokibafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafgafteya|gokibafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
